_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=synthetic mechanism witness certifying phase-lock-vs-naive under a global artifact; primary_source cites CHB-MIT (Shoeb 2009) + phase-conjugate memory (Soffer 1986). -->
primary_source: (Shoeb, 2009) CHB-MIT; (Soffer, 1986) DOI 10.1364/OL.11.000118. Two spatially-different topographies; a global artifact phi=6 fools naive classification (-> class 1) but phase-locked recall recovers the true class 0.
